help_block:
рџ¤– *SEC Analyzer Bot v3.0*

*Scans:*
`Any news?` В· `Check` В· `/sec`
`Insider` В· `/insider` В· `Check all` В· `/all`
`/sentiment` вЂ” portfolio insider score
`/sentiment trend [days]` вЂ” sentiment shift vs N days ago

*On-demand:*
`/scanticker AAPL` В· `/scanticker AAPL 10-K 4`
`/compare AAPL MSFT 10-K` вЂ” side-by-side
`/checkprice AAPL [days]` В· `/checknews AAPL [count]`

*Tickers:*
`/addticker AAPL MSFT` В· `/removeticker AAPL` В· `/listtickers`

*Groups:*
`/addgroup tech AAPL MSFT` В· `/removegroup tech` В· `/listgroups`
`/scangroup tech` В· `/scangroup tech 10-K 4`

*Forms:*
`/listforms` В· `/addform SC 13G` В· `/removeform 8-K`

*Custom Prompts:*
`/setprompt 10-K <text>` В· `/getprompt 10-K`
`/resetprompt 10-K` В· `/listprompts`

*Schedule:*
`/setschedule 08:00` В· `/setschedule off`
`/alarm` В· `/alarm off`
`/digest` В· `/digest now` В· `/digest off`

*Reports:*
`/report` вЂ” send this week's analyses as .md file

*Language:*
`/setlang en` В· `/setlang tr`

*Webhook:*
`/setwebhook <url>` В· `/delwebhook`

`/settings` В· `/status`
`/setmodel` В· `/setlookback 60` В· `/setchars 15000`
`/priceaction on|off` В· `/setlookforward 5`

*Active forms:* `{forms}`
*Tracking:* `{ticker_count}` ticker(s)
*Language:* `{language}`
cmd_desc_addword: Add a keyword phrase to monitor in EDGAR full-text search

cmd_desc_addpos: Add a position lot (ticker, qty, price, optional date)

addpos_usage:
